subject: Lost shared mailbox after role change
description: shared inbox vanished after my move, need it back
resolution: Permissions present but not propagated. Re-applied and confirmed access.

subject: Account disabled but person is back
description: colleague rejoined and account seems disabled
resolution: Inactive account from leaver process. Re-enabled and validated.

subject: WiFi wont authenticate
description: cant get on corp wifi, other people are fine
resolution: 802.1x cert issue. Re-issued and confirmed WiFi authentication.

subject: Device non compliant cant work
description: got an encryption required popup and now im blocked from everything
resolution: Encryption incomplete. Repaired and confirmed device compliant.

subject: Internal apps timing out
description: everything times out, name not resolved errors
resolution: Workstation DNS pointing at stale resolver. Reset network/DNS config, flushed cache, internal resolution restored (see KB: VPN Troubleshooting).

subject: Permission denied on export
description: cant export the quarterly client pack
resolution: Client reporting permission not assigned. Granted with client-book scoping, validated report generation (see KB: Client Reporting Portal Access).

subject: Cant login anywhere this morning
description: none of my logins work today, was fine friday
resolution: Corporate password expired (90-day policy). Reset via self-service and refreshed SSO sessions (see KB: Password Reset Procedure).

subject: Seeing screens i shouldnt / missing ones i need
description: my access doesnt match what my colleagues on the same desk have
resolution: User mapped to legacy department role. Reassigned correct role and removed extraneous entitlements.

subject: Outlook asking for password over and over
description: outlook keeps popping the password box, wont accept it
resolution: Local Outlook profile corrupted. Recreated profile and rebuilt OST cache; sync and search restored (see KB: Outlook Configuration).

subject: Laptop blocked encryption required
description: got an encryption required popup and now im blocked from everything
resolution: Full-disk encryption not enabled/escrowed. Enabled encryption, escrowed key, forced compliance re-eval, access restored (see KB: Device Encryption Requirements).

subject: App opens but says permission denied
description: it loads then throws permission denied, nothing changed on my side afaik
resolution: Entitlement not provisioned for the new department. Granted and validated.

subject: Cant vpn, compliance error
description: working from home and im blocked, says device non compliant
resolution: Partial: initial entitlement granted but user reports residual gaps; pending verification.

subject: Internal apps timing out
description: external sites load but none of our internal apps will
resolution: Workstation DNS pointing at stale resolver. Reset network/DNS config, flushed cache, internal resolution restored (see KB: VPN Troubleshooting).

subject: Blocked by a policy
description: something is blocking my sign in, says not allowed from here
resolution: Initially suspected VPN certificate; VPN was healthy. Policy required compliant device; remediated compliance and validated sign-in.

subject: VPN slow and keeps dropping
description: reinstalled and now it keeps dropping every few min
resolution: Outdated VPN profile/config. Re-imported current configuration, confirmed stable (see KB: VPN Troubleshooting).

subject: Connected to vpn but no access
description: vpn connects for a minute then dies, repeats all day
resolution: Outdated VPN profile/config. Re-imported current configuration, confirmed stable (see KB: VPN Troubleshooting).

subject: Trading platform behaving weird
description: cant submit trades, the button is greyed out
resolution: Trading profile misconfigured (module entitlements out of sync). Reconfigured profile, re-synced, validated screens (see KB: Trading Platform Access).

subject: No data in portfolio system
description: dashboard loads completely empty, no portfolios at all
resolution: Book-level scoping not applied. Corrected scoping and confirmed portfolios visible.

subject: Locked out again 5 min after unlock
description: you unlock me and it locks straight after, super annoying
root_cause: Account lockout from stale cached credential
resolution: Old mapped-drive credential driving lockouts. Removed and confirmed stable.

subject: Search broken in Outlook
description: stuck on loading profile forever, webmail works fine
resolution: Local Outlook profile corrupted. Recreated profile and rebuilt OST cache; sync and search restored (see KB: Outlook Configuration).

subject: Seeing screens i shouldnt / missing ones i need
description: i think im on the wrong profile, i can see ops stuff but not my advisory tools
resolution: User mapped to legacy department role. Reassigned correct role and removed extraneous entitlements.

subject: Cant see my client portfolios
description: dashboard loads completely empty, no portfolios at all
resolution: Book-level scoping not applied. Corrected scoping and confirmed portfolios visible.

subject: New laptop not enrolling
description: apps arent pushing to my device, nothing installs
resolution: Management profile failed. Re-pushed enrollment and validated app delivery.

subject: Portfolio view blank after transfer
description: i can see a couple books but most are missing
resolution: Book-level scoping not applied. Corrected scoping and confirmed portfolios visible.

subject: WiFi wont authenticate
description: keeps prompting for wifi credentials and rejecting them
resolution: 802.1x cert issue. Re-issued and confirmed WiFi authentication.

subject: Laptop blocked encryption required
description: keeps nagging about encryption, then conditional access blocks me
resolution: Full-disk encryption not enabled/escrowed. Enabled encryption, escrowed key, forced compliance re-eval, access restored (see KB: Device Encryption Requirements).

subject: Cant vpn, compliance error
description: laptop wont connect remotely, something about compliance policy
resolution: Device flagged non-compliant (pending updates). Remediated compliance, forced re-eval, remote access restored (see KB: Remote Access Troubleshooting).

subject: Search broken in Outlook
description: outlook crashes on open every time since this morning
resolution: Oversized/corrupt OST. Rebuilt profile, re-authenticated, validated mail flow.

resolution: Device VPN certificate expired. Re-enrolled certificate via Endpoint Management, restarted client, confirmed connection (see KB: VPN Certificate Renewal).

resolution: Profile pointed at wrong desk config. Corrected and confirmed blotter/approvals.

resolution: User missing from mailbox access group. Added to group, re-added mailbox after propagation, validated send-as (see KB: Shared Mailboxes).

resolution: Workstation DNS pointing at stale resolver. Reset network/DNS config, flushed cache, internal resolution restored (see KB: VPN Troubleshooting).

subject: Account keeps locking
description: you unlock me and it locks straight after, super annoying
root_cause: Account lockout from stale cached credential
resolution: Initially diagnosed as expired password; reset did not help. Stale credential on mobile mail client caused repeated lockouts. Cleared cached credential; no further lockouts (see KB: Account Lockout Recovery).

resolution: Enrollment failed due to known process defect during rollout. Cleared registration and re-enrolled with hardware token.

resolution: Partial/stale MFA method blocked enrollment. Removed stale method, re-enrolled via aka.ms/mfasetup, validated (see KB: MFA Enrollment).
